task_completion.description: Verify the 'Cooling Design Day' Dry Bulb High is set to 102.0°F.
task_completion.visual_evidence: eQUEST interface showing a design day or weather properties dialog with the 'Dry Bulb High' (or similar) field explicitly set to 102.0.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Cooling Design Day' Wet Bulb at Max is set to 75.0°F.
task_completion.visual_evidence: eQUEST interface showing a design day or weather properties dialog with the 'Wet Bulb at Max' (or similar) field explicitly set to 75.0.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Cooling Sizing Ratio' is changed to 1.25 for the Ground Floor HVAC systems.
task_completion.visual_evidence: eQUEST Air-Side HVAC system properties dialog or spreadsheet view showing the 'Cooling Sizing Ratio' set to 1.25 for systems with 'G.' in their names (e.g., G.S11, G.E12, G.N13, G.W14, G.C15).

task_completion.description: Verify a full annual simulation is executed.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A simulation progress dialog, a successful simulation completion message, or the simulation output viewer being displayed within eQUEST.

task_completion.description: Verify the project is saved after making the changes.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The agent clicking the 'Save' icon/menu item, a 'Save' dialog box, or a 'Project saved' confirmation.

integrity.description: The agent used the eQUEST GUI to modify the project rather than editing the .inp file directly in a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with eQUEST dialog boxes, menus, and input fields, not a text editor like Notepad or VS Code editing the raw .inp file.

integrity.description: The simulation was actually executed within the eQUEST application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The eQUEST simulation progress bar or native completion dialog is visible, rather than a terminal command or spoofed output.

integrity.description: The agent entered the target values into the correct application fields.
integrity.visual_evidence: The values (102.0, 75.0, 1.25) are typed into the specific eQUEST input fields, not just pasted into a generic script, terminal, or text file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target project file is '4StoreyBuilding.inp'. The target Cooling Design Day Dry Bulb High is 102.0°F and Wet Bulb at Max is 75.0°F. The target Cooling Sizing Ratio is 1.25 for the 5 Ground Floor HVAC systems, which can be identified by 'G.' in their names (Sys1 (PSZ) (G.S11), Sys1 (PSZ) (G.E12), Sys1 (PSZ) (G.N13), Sys1 (PSZ) (G.W14), Sys1 (PSZ) (G.C15)). A successful simulation typically generates a .SIM file and shows a simulation completion dialog in eQUEST.
